root.m_Talk_ENG: I, I finally... landed a hit on that bastard...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I, I finally... landed a hit on that bastard...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I, I finally... landed a hit on that bastard...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nice support... Dammit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nice support... Dammit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nice support... Dammit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess this is it for the chain he left me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess this is it for the chain he left me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess this is it for the chain he left me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I did use it for quite a long time. Since this got me involved with the Institution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I did use it for quite a long time. Since this got me involved with the Institution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I did use it for quite a long time. Since this got me involved with the Institution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if I can't use the chain, that means...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if I can't use the chain, that means...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if I can't use the chain, that means...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's just as paper nun said.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's just as paper nun said.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's just as paper nun said.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It really is a person. And...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It really is a person. And...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It really is a person. And...

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's still young.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's still young.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's still young.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe Sir Burnett was trying to take responsibility for the failure of that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He must have wished to allay concerns about the future... by using the Institution's approach to destroy the Holy Grail.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My grandfather really tried to get rid of this child?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My grandfather really tried to get rid of this child?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My grandfather really tried to get rid of this child?

root.m_Talk_ENG: He searched high and low in the Counterside for 15 years just to kill this one kid?
root.m_Talk_DEU: He searched high and low in the Counterside for 15 years just to kill this one kid?
root.m_Talk_FRA: He searched high and low in the Counterside for 15 years just to kill this one kid?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are not heroes of justice who can save everybody.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even in the Qliphoth Game, we chose the game instead of our own mission.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,
root.m_Talk_DEU: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,
root.m_Talk_FRA: For ordinary people like us to fight against a Demon Lord,

root.m_Talk_ENG: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.
root.m_Talk_DEU: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.
root.m_Talk_FRA: you have to accept that we have to weigh lives and choose the more efficient option.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Crud.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Crud.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Crud.
